creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to void from comment #23)

pkg-static is provided by the pkg package, not base.
so if you have a poudriere you can just update the ports
source tree an build your own.

If you wanna use official packages, you probably need to
wait a couple of hours or days until the new version was built
and available.

Once again, AFAIK, base is not impacted.
